];

const COLOR_STYLES = {
  teal: { activeTab: 'border-teal-700 text-teal-900 bg-teal-50', iconBg: 'bg-teal-50 text-teal-800 border-teal-200', menuIcon: 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-900', indicator: 'bg-teal-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-teal-700 bg-teal-50/50', textActive: 'text-teal-950' },
  indigo: { activeTab: 'border-indigo-700 text-indigo-900 bg-indigo-50', iconBg: 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-800 border-indigo-200', menuIcon: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-900', indicator: 'bg-indigo-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-indigo-700 bg-indigo-50/50', textActive: 'text-indigo-950' },
  blue: { activeTab: 'border-blue-700 text-blue-900 bg-blue-50', iconBg: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-800 border-blue-200', menuIcon: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-900', indicator: 'bg-blue-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-blue-700 bg-blue-50/50', textActive: 'text-blue-950' },
  amber: { activeTab: 'border-amber-600 text-amber-900 bg-amber-50', iconBg: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-800 border-amber-200', menuIcon: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-900', indicator: 'bg-amber-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-amber-600 bg-amber-50/50', textActive: 'text-amber-950' },
  rose: { activeTab: 'border-rose-700 text-rose-900 bg-rose-50', iconBg: 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-800 border-rose-200', menuIcon: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-900', indicator: 'bg-rose-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-rose-700 bg-rose-50/50', textActive: 'text-rose-950' },
  purple: { activeTab: 'border-purple-700 text-purple-900 bg-purple-50', iconBg: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-800 border-purple-200', menuIcon: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-900', indicator: 'bg-purple-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-purple-700 bg-purple-50/50', textActive: 'text-purple-950' },
  cyan: { activeTab: 'border-cyan-700 text-cyan-900 bg-cyan-50', iconBg: 'bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-800 border-cyan-200', menuIcon: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800', indicator: 'bg-cyan-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-cyan-700 bg-cyan-50/50', textActive: 'text-cyan-950' },
  slate: { activeTab: 'border-slate-700 text-slate-900 bg-slate-100', iconBg: 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 border-slate-300', menuIcon: 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-900', indicator: 'bg-slate-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-slate-700 bg-slate-100', textActive: 'text-slate-950' },
  emerald: { activeTab: 'border-emerald-700 text-emerald-900 bg-emerald-50', iconBg: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-800 border-emerald-200', menuIcon: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-900', indicator: 'bg-emerald-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50/50', textActive: 'text-emerald-950' }
};

export default function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ActiveTab>('DASHBOARD');
  const [isBlockMenuOpen, setIsBlockMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [pathologies, setPathologies] = useState<Pathology[]>([]);
  const [glossary, setGlossary] = useState<GlossaryTerm[]>(INITIAL_GLOSSARY);
  const [signs, setSigns] = useState<ClinicalSign[]>(INITIAL_SIGNS);
  const [animations, setAnimations] = useState<AnimationItem[]>([]);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<SystemCategory | 'ALL'>('ALL');
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');
  
  const [highContrast, setHighContrast] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('pae-high-contrast');
    return saved === 'true';
  });
  
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingPathology, setEditingPathology] = useState<Pathology | null>(null);
  const [autoTriggerAI, setAutoTriggerAI] = useState(false);
  const [showScrollTop, setShowScrollTop] = useState(false);
  const [selectedDrug, setSelectedDrug] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Random Tip for Dashboard
  const randomTip = useMemo(() => {
    if (pathologies.length === 0) return null;
    const validPathologies = pathologies.filter(p => p && p.name && p.notes);
    if (validPathologies.length === 0) return null;
    const randomP = validPathologies[Math.floor(Math.random() * validPathologies.length)];
    return { name: randomP.name, note: randomP.notes };
  }, [pathologies]);

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('pae-high-contrast', String(highContrast));
  }, [highContrast]);

  // --- INTELLIGENT ANIMATION MAPPING ---
  const generateDefaultAnimations = (currentPathologies: Pathology[]): AnimationItem[] => {
    const has = (str: string, keywords: string[]) => keywords.some(k => str.toLowerCase().includes(k));

    return currentPathologies.filter(p => p && p.name).map((p): AnimationItem => {
        const n = (p.name || '').toLowerCase();
        const d = (p.definition || '').toLowerCase();
        const combined = n + ' ' + d;

        let componentKey = 'UNIVERSAL';
        let universalConfig: SimulationConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 5 };

        if (has(combined, ['reflujo', 'erge', 'acidez', 'pirosis'])) componentKey = 'REFLUX_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['tce', 'craneoencefálico', 'craneal', 'golpe cabeza'])) componentKey = 'BRAIN_SIM_TBI';
        else if (has(combined, ['ventilación', 'respirador', 'distrés', 'ela'])) componentKey = 'VENTILATOR_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['dolor', 'nocicep', 'fibromialgia', 'ciática'])) componentKey = 'PAIN_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['preeclampsia', 'parto', 'fetal', 'embarazo'])) componentKey = 'PREGNANCY_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['cáncer', 'tumor', 'quimioterapia', 'leucemia', 'linfoma'])) componentKey = 'ONCOLOGY_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['lupus', 'autoimmune', 'reumatoide', 'artritis', 'esclerosis'])) componentKey = 'AUTOIMMUNE_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['diabetes', 'glucemia', 'insulina', 'hipoglucemia', 'cetoacidosis'])) componentKey = 'DIABETES_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['asma', 'broncoespasmo', 'bronquiolitis'])) componentKey = 'ASTHMA_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['epoc', 'enfisema'])) componentKey = 'ALVEOLI_SIM_COPD';
        else if (has(combined, ['neumonía', 'edema agudo', 'derrame', 'covid', 'tuberculosis'])) componentKey = 'ALVEOLI_SIM_FLUID';
        else if (has(combined, ['aneurisma', 'aorta'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_ANEURYSM';
        else if (has(combined, ['falciforme', 'hoz'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_SICKLE';
        else if (has(combined, ['anemia', 'neutropenia', 'púrpura'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_LOW';
        else if (has(combined, ['malaria', 'paludismo', 'dengue'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_MALARIA';
        else if (has(combined, ['sepsis', 'shock'])) componentKey = 'SEPSIS_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['ictus', 'acv', 'cerebral', 'delirium', 'meningitis'])) componentKey = 'BRAIN_SIM_STROKE';
        else if (has(combined, ['parkinson'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_PARKINSON';
        else if (has(combined, ['alzheimer', 'demencia'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_ALZHEIMER';
        else if (has(combined, ['esquizofrenia', 'psicosis', 'epilepsia', 'bipolar'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_SCHIZO';
        else if (has(combined, ['depresión', 'ansiedad', 'anorexia'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_DEPRESSION';
        else if (has(combined, ['quemadura', 'fuego', 'escaldadura'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_BURN';
        else if (has(combined, ['úlcera', 'upp', 'pie diabético', 'presión'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_UPP';
        else if (has(combined, ['psoriasis', 'escama', 'sarna', 'dermatitis'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_PSORIASIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['fractura', 'hueso', 'luxación', 'esguince', 'politrauma'])) componentKey = 'BONE_HEALING_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['quirúrgica', 'herida'])) componentKey = 'WOUND_HEALING_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['parada', 'pcr', 'asistolia'])) componentKey = 'HEART_SIM_PCR';
        else if (has(combined, ['fibrilación', 'infarto', 'iam', 'arritmia', 'angina', 'insuficiencia cardiaca', 'pericarditis'])) componentKey = 'HEART_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['hígado', 'cirrosis', 'alcohol', 'hepatitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_CIRRHOSIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['vesícula', 'litiasis', 'cálculo', 'colecistitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_STONE';
        else if (has(combined, ['pancreatitis', 'apendicitis', 'inflamación', 'crohn', 'colitis', 'diverticulitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_INFLAM';
        else if (has(combined, ['riñón', 'nefrítico', 'renal', 'cólico'])) componentKey = 'RENAL_SIM_STONE';
        else if (has(combined, ['orina', 'infección urinaria', 'pielonefritis', 'cistitis'])) componentKey = 'RENAL_SIM_INFECT';
        else if (has(combined, ['otitis', 'oído', 'vórtigo'])) componentKey = 'EAR_SIM_OTITIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['glaucoma', 'ocular', 'catarata'])) componentKey = 'EYE_SIM_GLAUCOMA';
        else if (has(combined, ['retina', 'desprendimiento'])) componentKey = 'EYE_SIM_RETINA';
        else if (has(combined, ['deshidratación', 'líquidos', 'suero', 'gastroenteritis'])) componentKey = 'IV_DRIP_SIM';
        else {
            // Fallback configuration
            switch(p.category) {
              case SystemCategory.CARDIOVASCULAR: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'red', type: 'PULSE', intensity: 7 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.RESPIRATORIO: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 6 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.NEUROLOGIA: case SystemCategory.PSIQUIATRIA: universalConfig = { speed: 'fast', color: 'purple', type: 'NEURO', intensity: 7 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.ONCOLOGICAS: universalConfig = { speed: 'slow', color: 'amber', type: 'GROWTH', intensity: 8 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.URGENCIAS: universalConfig = { speed: 'chaotic', color: 'red', type: 'PULSE', intensity: 9 }; break;
              default: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 5 };
            }
        }

        return {
          id: `anim_${p.id}`, 
          title: componentKey === 'UNIVERSAL' ? `Simulación: ${p.name}` : `${p.name}`, 
          type: 'SIMULATION' as const, 
          componentKey: componentKey, 
          config: universalConfig, 
          description: `Visualización interactiva para ${p.name}.`, 
          relatedSystem: p.category
        };
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const clearOldCache = () => {
      try {
        const storedVersion = localStorage.getItem('app_version_tag');
        if (storedVersion !== APP_VERSION) {
            console.log(`New version ${APP_VERSION} detected. Cleaning storage.`);
            localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY); 
            localStorage.setItem('app_version_tag', APP_VERSION);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error("Cache clear error", e);
      }
    };
    
    clearOldCache();

    const loadData = () => {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      let loadedPathologies = INITIAL_PATHOLOGIES;
      let loadedGlossary = INITIAL_GLOSSARY;
      let loadedSigns = INITIAL_SIGNS;

      if (saved) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
          if (parsed.pathologies && Array.isArray(parsed.pathologies)) {
             const savedIds = new Set(parsed.pathologies.map((p: any) => p.id));
             const newPathologies = INITIAL_PATHOLOGIES.filter(p => !savedIds.has(p.id));
             
             // Sanitize loaded pathologies to prevent crashes
             const validSavedPathologies = parsed.pathologies.filter((p: any) => p && p.id && p.name);
             
             loadedPathologies = [...validSavedPathologies, ...newPathologies];
             loadedGlossary = [...(parsed.glossary || []), ...INITIAL_GLOSSARY.filter(g => !parsed.glossary?.some((pg:any) => pg.id === g.id))];
             loadedSigns = [...(parsed.signs || []), ...INITIAL_SIGNS.filter(s => !parsed.signs?.some((ps:any) => ps.id === s.id))];
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Error parsing localStorage, resetting to defaults", e);
        }
      }
      
      setPathologies(loadedPathologies);
      setGlossary(loadedGlossary);
      setSigns(loadedSigns);
      setAnimations(generateDefaultAnimations(loadedPathologies));
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (pathologies.length > 0) {
      const fullData = { pathologies, glossary, signs, animations };
      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(fullData));
    }
  }, [pathologies, glossary, signs, animations]);

  const handleHardReset = () => {
    if (confirm(`¿Estás seguro? Esto borrará tus cambios personalizados y restaurará la base de datos original a la versión ${APP_VERSION}.`)) {
      localStorage.clear();
      window.location.reload();
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkScroll = () => {
      if (window.scrollY > 300) setShowScrollTop(true);
      else setShowScrollTop(false);
    };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', checkScroll);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', checkScroll);
  }, []);

  const scrollToTop = () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });

  const handleSave = (pathology: Pathology) => {
    setPathologies(prev => {
       const exists = prev.find(p => p.id === pathology.id);
       return exists ? prev.map(p => p.id === pathology.id ? pathology : p) : [...prev, pathology];
    });
    setAnimations(prev => {
       const newAnims = generateDefaultAnimations([pathology]);
       const filtered = prev.filter(a => a.id !== `anim_${pathology.id}`);
       return [...filtered, ...newAnims];
    });
    setIsModalOpen(false);
    setEditingPathology(null);
    setAutoTriggerAI(false);
    if(activeTab === 'DASHBOARD') setActiveTab('PATHOLOGIES'); // Redirect to list
  };

  const handleCreateFromDiagnosis = (partialPathology: Partial<Pathology>) => {
    const tempId = crypto.randomUUID();
    const newPathology: Pathology = {
      id: tempId,
      name: partialPathology.name || '',
      category: partialPathology.category || SystemCategory.OTROS,
      definition: partialPathology.definition || '',
      symptoms: partialPathology.symptoms || '',
      etiology: partialPathology.etiology || '',
      patterns: partialPathology.patterns || '',
      assessment: partialPathology.assessment || '',
      nanda: partialPathology.nanda || '',
      nic: partialPathology.nic || '',
      noc: partialPathology.noc || '',
      carePlan: partialPathology.carePlan || '',
      education: partialPathology.education || '',
      followUp: partialPathology.followUp || '',
      meds: partialPathology.meds || '',
      notes: partialPathology.notes || 'Generado desde Asistente Clínico'
    };
    setEditingPathology(newPathology);
    setAutoTriggerAI(true);
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const handleAiExtracted = (newGlossary: GlossaryTerm[], newSigns: ClinicalSign[]) => {
    setGlossary(prev => {
      const combined = [...prev];
      newGlossary.forEach(newItem => {
        if (!combined.some(existing => existing.term.toLowerCase() === newItem.term.toLowerCase())) {
          combined.push(newItem);
        }
      });
      return combined.sort((a, b) => a.term.localeCompare(b.term));
    });
    setSigns(prev => {
      const combined = [...prev];
      newSigns.forEach(newItem => {
        if (!combined.some(existing => existing.name.toLowerCase() === newItem.name.toLowerCase())) {
          combined.push(newItem);
        }
      });
      return combined.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    });
  };

  const handleDelete = (id: string) => {
    if (confirm('¿Estás seguro de eliminar esta ficha?')) {
      setPathologies(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== id));
      setAnimations(prev => prev.filter(a => a.id !== `anim_${id}`));
      setIsModalOpen(false);
    }
  };

  const handleNandaClick = (nandaCode: string) => {
    setSearchTerm(nandaCode);
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  };

  const handleMedClick = (med: string) => {
    setSelectedDrug(med);
  };

  const renderTabs = () => {
    const currentBlock = BLOCKS.find(b => b.id === activeTab) || BLOCKS[0];
    const currentStyles = COLOR_STYLES[currentBlock.color];

    return (
      <nav className="mb-4 md:mb-6 relative z-20" aria-label="Navegación principal">
        <div className="md:hidden">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setIsBlockMenuOpen(!isBlockMenuOpen)} 
            className="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-between active:scale-[0.99] transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-600 focus:outline-none touch-manipulation min-h-[60px]"
            aria-expanded={isBlockMenuOpen}
            aria-haspopup="true"
          >
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className={`p-2.5 rounded-lg border ${currentStyles.iconBg}`}><currentBlock.icon size={20} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
               <div className="text-left"><span className="block text-xs text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-0.5">Sección Actual</span><span className="block text-base font-bold text-slate-800 leading-none">{currentBlock.label}</span></div>
             </div>
             <div className={`p-2 rounded-full bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 transition-transform duration-300 ${isBlockMenuOpen ? 'rotate-180 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700' : ''}`}>{isBlockMenuOpen ? <X size={20} aria-hidden="true" /> : <Grid size={20} aria-hidden="true" />}</div>
          </button>
          {isBlockMenuOpen && (
             <>
               <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity" onClick={() => setIsBlockMenuOpen(false)}></div>
               <div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-2 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden animate-in slide-in-from-top-5 duration-300 z-50 p-3 max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    {BLOCKS.map(block => {
                       const styles = COLOR_STYLES[block.color];
                       const isActive = activeTab === block.id;
                       return (
                         <button key={block.id} onClick={() => { setActiveTab(block.id as ActiveTab); setIsBlockMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 touch-manipulation text-center min-h-[120px] relative overflow-hidden focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:outline-none ${isActive ? `border-transparent shadow-md ${styles.cardActive}` : 'border-slate-100 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm hover:border-slate-200 focus:ring-teal-500'}`}>
                            <div className={`p-3 rounded-full mb-3 transition-transform duration-300 ${isActive ? 'bg-white shadow-sm scale-110' : 'bg-white'}`}><block.icon size={24} className={isActive ? styles.textActive : 'text-slate-500'} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
                            <span className={`text-sm font-bold leading-tight ${isActive ? styles.textActive : 'text-slate-700'}`}>{block.label}</span>
                         </button>
                       );
                    })}
                  </div>
               </div>
             </>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="hidden md:flex gap-2 border-b border-slate-200 overflow-x-auto pb-1 scrollbar-hide">
          {BLOCKS.map(block => {
             const styles = COLOR_STYLES[block.color];
             return (
               <button key={block.id} onClick={() => setActiveTab(block.id as ActiveTab)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold transition-all border-b-2 whitespace-nowrap focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 ${activeTab === block.id ? `${styles.activeTab} rounded-t-lg` : 'border-transparent text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-t-lg'}`}>
                 <block.icon size={18} aria-hidden="true" /> {block.label}
               </button>
             );
          })}
        </div>
      </nav>
    );
  };

  // --- AUTOMATIC GROUPING AND SORTING LOGIC ---
  const groupedPathologies = useMemo(() => {
    // 1. FILTERING
    const filtered = pathologies.filter(p => {
      if (!p || !p.name) return false;
      const searchLower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
      
      const name = (p.name || '').toLowerCase();
      const symptoms = (p.symptoms || '').toLowerCase();
      const nanda = (p.nanda || '').toLowerCase();

      const matchesSearch = name.includes(searchLower) || 
                            symptoms.includes(searchLower) ||
                            nanda.includes(searchLower);
                            
      const matchesCategory = selectedCategory === 'ALL' || p.category === selectedCategory;
      return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;
    });

    // 2. GROUPING BY CATEGORY
    const groups: Record<string, Pathology[]> = {};
    filtered.forEach(p => {
        const cat = p.category || 'Otros';
        if (!groups[cat]) groups[cat] = [];
        groups[cat].push(p);
    });

    // 3. SORTING KEYS (Categories Alphabetically)
    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(groups).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));

    // 4. SORTING VALUES (Pathologies Alphabetically within Group)
    sortedKeys.forEach(key => {
        groups[key].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    });

    return { groups, sortedKeys, totalCount: filtered.length };
  }, [pathologies, searchTerm, selectedCategory]);

  return (
    <div className={`min-h-screen text-slate-800 pb-24 font-sans transition-colors duration-300 ${highContrast ? 'bg-white contrast-125' : 'bg-slate-50'}`}>
      <a href="#main-content" className="sr-only focus:not-sr-only focus:fixed focus:top-4 focus:left-4 focus:z-50 focus:px-4 focus:py-2 focus:bg-white focus:text-indigo-800 focus:font-bold focus:shadow-lg focus:rounded-lg focus:border-2 focus:border-indigo-600">Saltar al contenido principal</a>

      <header className={`bg-indigo-950 text-white sticky top-0 z-30 shadow-lg ${highContrast ? 'bg-black border-b-2 border-white' : ''}`}>
        <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-4">
           <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="bg-white/10 p-2 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-sm"><Database className="text-indigo-100" size={24} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
              <div><h1 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold leading-tight">Enfermería PAE</h1><p className="text-indigo-200 text-xs font-medium tracking-wide opacity-90">PROYECTO VIVO {APP_VERSION}</p></div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
               {activeTab === 'PATHOLOGIES' && <button onClick={() => { setEditingPathology(null); setIsModalOpen(true); }} className="md:hidden bg-white text-indigo-800 p-2 rounded-full shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none" aria-label="Añadir nueva patología"><Plus size={24} aria-hidden="true" /></button>}
               <button 
                 onClick={() => setHighContrast(!highContrast)} 
                 className={`bg-indigo-800/50 p-2 rounded-lg text-white hover:bg-indigo-950/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none ${highContrast ? 'ring-2 ring-white' : ''}`} 
                 aria-label={highContrast ? "Desactivar alto contraste" : "Activar alto contraste"}
                 title="Alto Contraste"
               >
                 <Eye size={20} aria-hidden="true"/>
               </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          {activeTab !== 'DASHBOARD' && activeTab !== 'ASSISTANT' && activeTab !== 'TOOLS' && activeTab !== 'VITALS' && activeTab !== 'CASE_MANAGER' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
               <div className="relative w-full flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="relative flex-1">
                    <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-indigo-200" size={18} aria-hidden="true" />
                    <input 
                      type="text" 
                      placeholder="Buscar patología, síntoma o código..." 
                      value={searchTerm} 
                      onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} 
                      className={`w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-indigo-900/50 border border-indigo-600 rounded-lg text-white placeholder-indigo-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/50 ${highContrast ? 'bg-black border-white placeholder-white' : ''}`} 
                      aria-label="Buscar en el catálogo"
                    />
                    {searchTerm && (
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}
                        className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-indigo-300 hover:text-white p-1 rounded focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white"
                        aria-label="Borrar búsqueda"
                      >
                        <X size={16} aria-hidden="true" />
                      </button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {/* VIEW MODE TOGGLE */}
                  {activeTab === 'PATHOLOGIES' && (
                    <div className="flex bg-indigo-900/50 rounded-lg border border-indigo-600 p-1" role="group" aria-label="Vista">
                        <button 
                          onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')} 
                          className={`p-1.5 rounded transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white ${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-800 shadow-sm' : 'text-indigo-200 hover:text-white'}`}
                          aria-label="Vista en cuadrícula"
                          aria-pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
                        >
                            <LayoutGrid size={18} aria-hidden="true" />
                        </button>
                        <button 
                          onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} 
                          className={`p-1.5 rounded transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white ${viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-800 shadow-sm' : 'text-indigo-200 hover:text-white'}`}
                          aria-label="Vista en lista"
                          aria-pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
                        >
                            <AlignJustify size={18} aria-hidden="true" />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                  )}
               </div>

               {activeTab === 'PATHOLOGIES' && (
                 <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1 scrollbar-hide -mx-4 px-4 md:mx-0 md:px-0 sticky top-[88px] z-20" role="tablist" aria-label="Categorías">
                    <button 
                      onClick={() => setSelectedCategory('ALL')}
                      className={`whitespace-nowrap px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold transition-colors border focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white ${selectedCategory === 'ALL' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-800 border-white' : 'bg-indigo-900/30 text-indigo-100 border-indigo-600/50 hover:bg-indigo-800/50'}`}
                      role="tab"
                      aria-selected={selectedCategory === 'ALL'}
                    >
                      Todas
                    </button>
                    {(Object.values(SystemCategory) as SystemCategory[]).map(cat => (
                       <button 
                         key={cat} 
                         onClick={() => setSelectedCategory(cat)}
                         className={`whitespace-nowrap px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold transition-colors border flex items-center gap-1.5 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white ${selectedCategory === cat ? 'bg-white text-indigo-800 border-white' : 'bg-indigo-900/30 text-indigo-100 border-indigo-600/50 hover:bg-indigo-800/50'}`}
                         role="tab"
                         aria-selected={selectedCategory === cat}
                       >
                         <SystemIcon category={cat} className="w-3 h-3" />
                         {cat}
                       </button>
                    ))}
                 </div>
               )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </header>

      <main id="main-content" className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-6 focus:outline-none" tabIndex={-1}>
        {renderTabs()}

        {activeTab === 'DASHBOARD' && (
           <div className="space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
              {/* Stats Row */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                 <div className="bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Patologías</div>
                    <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800">{pathologies.length}</div>
                 </div>
                 <div className="bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Términos</div>
                    <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800">{glossary.length}</div>
                 </div>
                 <div className="bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Signos</div>
                    <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800">{signs.length}</div>
                 </div>
                 <div className="bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Simulaciones</div>
                    <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800">{animations.length}</div>
                 </div>
              </div>

              {/* Clinical Pearl */}
              {randomTip && (
                 <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-500 to-purple-600 rounded-2xl p-6 text-white shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 opacity-10"><Lightbulb size={100} /></div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"><Sparkles size={18} /> Perla Clínica del Día</h3>
                    <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide mb-3">{randomTip.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xl font-serif italic leading-relaxed relative z-10">"{randomTip.note}"</p>
                 </div>
              )}

              {/* Shortcuts */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                 <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('ASSISTANT')} className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 hover:border-indigo-300 hover:shadow-md transition-all text-left group">
                    <div className="bg-indigo-50 w-12 h-12 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-600 mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"><ClipboardCheck size={24} /></div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-lg mb-1">Asistente Clínico</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Triaje y diagnóstico diferencial con IA.</p>
                 </button>
                 <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('VITALS')} className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 hover:border-cyan-300 hover:shadow-md transition-all text-left group">
                    <div className="bg-cyan-50 w-12 h-12 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-cyan-600 mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"><Activity size={24} /></div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-lg mb-1">Constantes Vitales</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Monitorización y registro rápido.</p>
                 </button>
                 <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('CASE_MANAGER')} className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-400 hover:shadow-md transition-all text-left group">
                    <div className="bg-slate-100 w-12 h-12 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-slate-600 mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"><UserCog size={24} /></div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-lg mb-1">Simulación de Casos</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Entrenamiento clínico evolutivo.</p>
                 </button>
              </div>
           </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'PATHOLOGIES' && (
           <>
             <div className="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">
                 {groupedPathologies.totalCount} patologías encontradas.
             </div>
             
             {/* AUTOMATIC GROUPING AND SORTING DISPLAY */}
             <div className="space-y-10 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
                {groupedPathologies.sortedKeys.map(category => (
                    <div key={category} className="space-y-4">
                        {/* Section Header */}
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-indigo-100 pb-2 mb-4">
                            <div className="p-1.5 bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg text-indigo-700">
                                <SystemIcon category={category as SystemCategory} className="w-5 h-5" />
                            </div>
                            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-2">
                                {category}
                                <span className="text-xs font-normal text-slate-500 bg-slate-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                                    {groupedPathologies.groups[category].length}
                                </span>
                            </h3>
                        </div>

                        {/* Grid/List of Pathologies */}
                        <div className={`${viewMode === 'grid' ? 'grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4' : 'flex flex-col gap-2'}`}>
                            {groupedPathologies.groups[category].map(p => (
                                <PathologyCard 
                                    key={p.id} 
                                    data={p} 
                                    onEdit={(path) => { setEditingPathology(path); setIsModalOpen(true); }} 
                                    onNandaClick={handleNandaClick}
                                    onMedClick={handleMedClick}
                                    viewMode={viewMode}
                                    glossary={glossary}
                                    signs={signs}
                                    animationConfig={animations.find(a => a.id === `anim_${p.id}`)}
                                />
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ))}

                {groupedPathologies.totalCount === 0 && (
                  <div className="col-span-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-slate-500">
                    <Search size={48} className="mb-4 opacity-50" aria-hidden="true" />
                    <p className="text-lg font-medium">No se encontraron resultados.</p>
                    {searchTerm && (
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')} 
                        className="mt-4 text-indigo-700 hover:underline text-sm font-bold focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-600 rounded"
                      >
                        Limpiar búsqueda
                      </button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
             </div>
           </>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'ASSISTANT' && (
            <DiagnosisAssistant 
                existingPathologyNames={pathologies.map(p => p.name)} 
                onCreatePathology={handleCreateFromDiagnosis}
            />
        )}

        {activeTab === 'VITALS' && (
            <VitalSignsInput />
        )}

        {activeTab === 'CASE_MANAGER' && (
            <ClinicalCaseManager />
        )}

        {activeTab === 'TOOLS' && (
            <ClinicalCalculators />
        )}

        {activeTab === 'GLOSSARY' && (
           <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {glossary
                  .filter(g => g.term.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || g.definition.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()))
                  .sort((a, b) => a.term.localeCompare(b.term))
                  .map(g => (
                    <div key={g.id} className={`p-4 rounded-lg shadow-sm border transition-all group ${highContrast ? 'bg-white border-black' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 hover:border-blue-400'}`}>
                       <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-1">
                          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 group-hover:text-blue-800 transition-colors">{g.term}</h3>
                          {g.category && <span className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-200">{g.category}</span>}
                       </div>
                       <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 leading-relaxed">{g.definition}</p>
                    </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              {glossary.length === 0 && <div className="text-center text-slate-500 py-10">El glosario está vacío. Añade patologías con IA para poblarlo.</div>}
           </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'SIGNS' && (
           <div className="space-y-8">
              {Object.values(SystemCategory).map(sys => {
                 const sysSigns = signs.filter(s => s.relatedSystem === sys && s.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));
                 if (sysSigns.length === 0) return null;

                 return (
                    <div key={sys} className={`rounded-xl border overflow-hidden shadow-sm ${highContrast ? 'border-black' : 'bg-white border-slate-200'}`}>
                       <div className={`p-3 flex items-center gap-2 ${highContrast ? 'bg-black text-white' : 'bg-amber-50/50 border-b border-amber-200'}`}>
                          <SystemIcon category={sys} className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <h3 className={`font-bold ${highContrast ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-900'}`}>{sys}</h3>
                          <span className="text-xs bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 font-bold">{sysSigns.length}</span>
                       </div>
                       <div className="divide-y divide-slate-100 bg-white">
                          {sysSigns.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)).map(s => (
                             <div key={s.id} className="p-4 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors flex gap-3">
                                <div className="mt-1 text-amber-600"><Tag size={16} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
                                <div>
                                   <h4 className="font-bold text-slate-900">{s.name}</h4>
                                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mt-0.5">{s.description}</p>
                                </div>
                             </div>
                          ))}
                       </div>
                    </div>
                 )
              })}
           </div>
        )}
      </main>
      {isModalOpen && (
        <PathologyForm 
          initialData={editingPathology} 
          onSave={handleSave} 
          onDelete={handleDelete}
          onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)}
          onAiExtracted={handleAiExtracted}
          autoGenerate={autoTriggerAI}
        />
      )}
      {selectedDrug && (
        <MedicationModal 
          drugName={selectedDrug}
          onClose={() => setSelectedDrug(null)}
        />
      )}
      {showScrollTop && (
        <button 
          onClick={scrollToTop} 
          className="fixed bottom-6 right-6 p-3 bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-indigo-800 transition-colors z-40 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-400"
          aria-label="Volver al inicio de la página"
        >
          <ArrowUp size={24} aria-hidden="true" />
        </button>
      )}
      <footer className={`mt-auto py-6 border-t text-center text-xs font-medium ${highContrast ? 'bg-black border-white text-white' : 'bg-slate-100 border-slate-200 text-slate-600'}`}>
        <p>© 2024 Enfermería PAE - Proyecto Vivo</p>
        <p className="mt-1 opacity-80">Creado por <span className="font-bold">Daniel Serrano De Pablo</span> y <span className="font-bold">David Alfonso Isla Cataño</span></p>
        <p className="mt-2 text-[10px] opacity-60 font-mono">Versión de Base de Datos: {APP_VERSION}</p>
        <div className="mt-3">
           <button onClick={handleHardReset} className="text-red-600 hover:underline font-bold flex items-center gap-1 justify-center mx-auto border border-red-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-red-50"><Trash2 size={12}/> Reiniciar Datos (Forzar)</button>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  );
}

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Pathology, SystemCategory, GlossaryTerm, ClinicalSign, AnimationItem, SimulationConfig } from './types';
import { INITIAL_PATHOLOGIES, INITIAL_GLOSSARY, INITIAL_SIGNS } from './constants';
import { PathologyCard } from './components/PathologyCard';
import { PathologyForm } from './components/PathologyForm';
import { MedicationModal } from './components/MedicationModal';
import { SystemIcon } from './components/SystemIcon';
import { VISUALIZER_COMPONENTS } from './components/ClinicalVisualizers';
import { ClinicalCalculators } from './components/ClinicalCalculators';
import { DiagnosisAssistant } from './components/DiagnosisAssistant';
import { VitalSignsInput } from './components/VitalSignsInput';
import { ClinicalCaseManager } from './components/ClinicalCaseManager';
import { Plus, Search, Database, Sparkles, BookOpen, Stethoscope, List, ClipboardCheck, Grid, X, Tag, ArrowUp, LayoutGrid, AlignJustify, Eye, Calculator, Trash2, Activity, UserCog, Home, Lightbulb } from 'lucide-react';

const APP_VERSION = 'v41.0-FULL-LOAD';
const STORAGE_KEY = `nursing-pae-data-${APP_VERSION}`;

type ActiveTab = 'DASHBOARD' | 'PATHOLOGIES' | 'GLOSSARY' | 'SIGNS' | 'ASSISTANT' | 'TOOLS' | 'VITALS' | 'CASE_MANAGER';

interface BlockConfig {
  id: ActiveTab;
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  color: 'teal' | 'indigo' | 'blue' | 'amber' | 'rose' | 'purple' | 'cyan' | 'slate' | 'emerald';
  desc: string;
}

const BLOCKS: BlockConfig[] = [
  { id: 'DASHBOARD', label: 'Inicio', icon: Home, color: 'emerald', desc: 'Resumen' },
  { id: 'PATHOLOGIES', label: 'Patologías', icon: BookOpen, color: 'teal', desc: 'Catálogo' },
  { id: 'ASSISTANT', label: 'Asistente', icon: ClipboardCheck, color: 'indigo', desc: 'IA Clínica' },
  { id: 'CASE_MANAGER', label: 'Casos (Evol)', icon: UserCog, color: 'slate', desc: 'Simulación' },
  { id: 'VITALS', label: 'Constantes', icon: Activity, color: 'cyan', desc: 'Monitorización' },
  { id: 'GLOSSARY', label: 'Glosario', icon: List, color: 'blue', desc: 'Términos' },
  { id: 'SIGNS', label: 'Signos', icon: Stethoscope, color: 'amber', desc: 'Semiología' },
  { id: 'TOOLS', label: 'Calculadoras', icon: Calculator, color: 'purple', desc: 'Herramientas' },
];

const COLOR_STYLES = {
  teal: { activeTab: 'border-teal-700 text-teal-900 bg-teal-50', iconBg: 'bg-teal-50 text-teal-800 border-teal-200', menuIcon: 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-900', indicator: 'bg-teal-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-teal-700 bg-teal-50/50', textActive: 'text-teal-950' },
  indigo: { activeTab: 'border-indigo-700 text-indigo-900 bg-indigo-50', iconBg: 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-800 border-indigo-200', menuIcon: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-900', indicator: 'bg-indigo-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-indigo-700 bg-indigo-50/50', textActive: 'text-indigo-950' },
  blue: { activeTab: 'border-blue-700 text-blue-900 bg-blue-50', iconBg: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-800 border-blue-200', menuIcon: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-900', indicator: 'bg-blue-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-blue-700 bg-blue-50/50', textActive: 'text-blue-950' },
  amber: { activeTab: 'border-amber-600 text-amber-900 bg-amber-50', iconBg: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-800 border-amber-200', menuIcon: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-900', indicator: 'bg-amber-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-amber-600 bg-amber-50/50', textActive: 'text-amber-950' },
  rose: { activeTab: 'border-rose-700 text-rose-900 bg-rose-50', iconBg: 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-800 border-rose-200', menuIcon: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-900', indicator: 'bg-rose-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-rose-700 bg-rose-50/50', textActive: 'text-rose-950' },
  purple: { activeTab: 'border-purple-700 text-purple-900 bg-purple-50', iconBg: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-800 border-purple-200', menuIcon: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-900', indicator: 'bg-purple-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-purple-700 bg-purple-50/50', textActive: 'text-purple-950' },
  cyan: { activeTab: 'border-cyan-700 text-cyan-900 bg-cyan-50', iconBg: 'bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-800 border-cyan-200', menuIcon: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800', indicator: 'bg-cyan-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-cyan-700 bg-cyan-50/50', textActive: 'text-cyan-950' },
  slate: { activeTab: 'border-slate-700 text-slate-900 bg-slate-100', iconBg: 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 border-slate-300', menuIcon: 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-900', indicator: 'bg-slate-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-slate-700 bg-slate-100', textActive: 'text-slate-950' },
  emerald: { activeTab: 'border-emerald-700 text-emerald-900 bg-emerald-50', iconBg: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-800 border-emerald-200', menuIcon: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-900', indicator: 'bg-emerald-700', cardActive: 'ring-2 ring-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50/50', textActive: 'text-emerald-950' }
};

export default function App() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ActiveTab>('DASHBOARD');
  const [isBlockMenuOpen, setIsBlockMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [pathologies, setPathologies] = useState<Pathology[]>([]);
  const [glossary, setGlossary] = useState<GlossaryTerm[]>(INITIAL_GLOSSARY);
  const [signs, setSigns] = useState<ClinicalSign[]>(INITIAL_SIGNS);
  const [animations, setAnimations] = useState<AnimationItem[]>([]);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<SystemCategory | 'ALL'>('ALL');
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');
  
  const [highContrast, setHighContrast] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('pae-high-contrast');
    return saved === 'true';
  });
  
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingPathology, setEditingPathology] = useState<Pathology | null>(null);
  const [autoTriggerAI, setAutoTriggerAI] = useState(false);
  const [showScrollTop, setShowScrollTop] = useState(false);
  const [selectedDrug, setSelectedDrug] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Random Tip for Dashboard
  const randomTip = useMemo(() => {
    if (pathologies.length === 0) return null;
    const validPathologies = pathologies.filter(p => p && p.name && p.notes);
    if (validPathologies.length === 0) return null;
    const randomP = validPathologies[Math.floor(Math.random() * validPathologies.length)];
    return { name: randomP.name, note: randomP.notes };
  }, [pathologies]);

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('pae-high-contrast', String(highContrast));
  }, [highContrast]);

  // --- INTELLIGENT ANIMATION MAPPING ---
  const generateDefaultAnimations = (currentPathologies: Pathology[]): AnimationItem[] => {
    const has = (str: string, keywords: string[]) => keywords.some(k => str.toLowerCase().includes(k));

    return currentPathologies.filter(p => p && p.name).map((p): AnimationItem => {
        const n = (p.name || '').toLowerCase();
        const d = (p.definition || '').toLowerCase();
        const combined = n + ' ' + d;

        let componentKey = 'UNIVERSAL';
        let universalConfig: SimulationConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 5 };

        if (has(combined, ['reflujo', 'erge', 'acidez', 'pirosis'])) componentKey = 'REFLUX_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['tce', 'craneoencefálico', 'craneal', 'golpe cabeza'])) componentKey = 'BRAIN_SIM_TBI';
        else if (has(combined, ['ventilación', 'respirador', 'distrés', 'ela'])) componentKey = 'VENTILATOR_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['dolor', 'nocicep', 'fibromialgia', 'ciática'])) componentKey = 'PAIN_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['preeclampsia', 'parto', 'fetal', 'embarazo'])) componentKey = 'PREGNANCY_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['cáncer', 'tumor', 'quimioterapia', 'leucemia', 'linfoma'])) componentKey = 'ONCOLOGY_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['lupus', 'autoimmune', 'reumatoide', 'artritis', 'esclerosis'])) componentKey = 'AUTOIMMUNE_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['diabetes', 'glucemia', 'insulina', 'hipoglucemia', 'cetoacidosis'])) componentKey = 'DIABETES_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['asma', 'broncoespasmo', 'bronquiolitis'])) componentKey = 'ASTHMA_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['epoc', 'enfisema'])) componentKey = 'ALVEOLI_SIM_COPD';
        else if (has(combined, ['neumonía', 'edema agudo', 'derrame', 'covid', 'tuberculosis'])) componentKey = 'ALVEOLI_SIM_FLUID';
        else if (has(combined, ['aneurisma', 'aorta'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_ANEURYSM';
        else if (has(combined, ['falciforme', 'hoz'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_SICKLE';
        else if (has(combined, ['anemia', 'neutropenia', 'púrpura'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_LOW';
        else if (has(combined, ['malaria', 'paludismo', 'dengue'])) componentKey = 'VESSEL_SIM_MALARIA';
        else if (has(combined, ['sepsis', 'shock'])) componentKey = 'SEPSIS_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['ictus', 'acv', 'cerebral', 'delirium', 'meningitis'])) componentKey = 'BRAIN_SIM_STROKE';
        else if (has(combined, ['parkinson'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_PARKINSON';
        else if (has(combined, ['alzheimer', 'demencia'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_ALZHEIMER';
        else if (has(combined, ['esquizofrenia', 'psicosis', 'epilepsia', 'bipolar'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_SCHIZO';
        else if (has(combined, ['depresión', 'ansiedad', 'anorexia'])) componentKey = 'NEURO_SIM_DEPRESSION';
        else if (has(combined, ['quemadura', 'fuego', 'escaldadura'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_BURN';
        else if (has(combined, ['úlcera', 'upp', 'pie diabético', 'presión'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_UPP';
        else if (has(combined, ['psoriasis', 'escama', 'sarna', 'dermatitis'])) componentKey = 'SKIN_SIM_PSORIASIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['fractura', 'hueso', 'luxación', 'esguince', 'politrauma'])) componentKey = 'BONE_HEALING_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['quirúrgica', 'herida'])) componentKey = 'WOUND_HEALING_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['parada', 'pcr', 'asistolia'])) componentKey = 'HEART_SIM_PCR';
        else if (has(combined, ['fibrilación', 'infarto', 'iam', 'arritmia', 'angina', 'insuficiencia cardiaca', 'pericarditis'])) componentKey = 'HEART_SIM';
        else if (has(combined, ['hígado', 'cirrosis', 'alcohol', 'hepatitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_CIRRHOSIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['vesícula', 'litiasis', 'cálculo', 'colecistitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_STONE';
        else if (has(combined, ['pancreatitis', 'apendicitis', 'inflamación', 'crohn', 'colitis', 'diverticulitis'])) componentKey = 'DIGESTIVE_SIM_INFLAM';
        else if (has(combined, ['riñón', 'nefrítico', 'renal', 'cólico'])) componentKey = 'RENAL_SIM_STONE';
        else if (has(combined, ['orina', 'infección urinaria', 'pielonefritis', 'cistitis'])) componentKey = 'RENAL_SIM_INFECT';
        else if (has(combined, ['otitis', 'oído', 'vórtigo'])) componentKey = 'EAR_SIM_OTITIS';
        else if (has(combined, ['glaucoma', 'ocular', 'catarata'])) componentKey = 'EYE_SIM_GLAUCOMA';
        else if (has(combined, ['retina', 'desprendimiento'])) componentKey = 'EYE_SIM_RETINA';
        else if (has(combined, ['deshidratación', 'líquidos', 'suero', 'gastroenteritis'])) componentKey = 'IV_DRIP_SIM';
        else {
            // Fallback configuration
            switch(p.category) {
              case SystemCategory.CARDIOVASCULAR: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'red', type: 'PULSE', intensity: 7 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.RESPIRATORIO: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 6 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.NEUROLOGIA: case SystemCategory.PSIQUIATRIA: universalConfig = { speed: 'fast', color: 'purple', type: 'NEURO', intensity: 7 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.ONCOLOGICAS: universalConfig = { speed: 'slow', color: 'amber', type: 'GROWTH', intensity: 8 }; break;
              case SystemCategory.URGENCIAS: universalConfig = { speed: 'chaotic', color: 'red', type: 'PULSE', intensity: 9 }; break;
              default: universalConfig = { speed: 'normal', color: 'blue', type: 'FLOW', intensity: 5 };
            }
        }

        return {
          id: `anim_${p.id}`, 
          title: componentKey === 'UNIVERSAL' ? `Simulación: ${p.name}` : `${p.name}`, 
          type: 'SIMULATION' as const, 
          componentKey: componentKey, 
          config: universalConfig, 
          description: `Visualización interactiva para ${p.name}.`, 
          relatedSystem: p.category
        };
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const clearOldCache = () => {
      try {
        const storedVersion = localStorage.getItem('app_version_tag');
        if (storedVersion !== APP_VERSION) {
            console.log(`New version ${APP_VERSION} detected. Cleaning storage.`);
            localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY); 
            localStorage.setItem('app_version_tag', APP_VERSION);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error("Cache clear error", e);
      }
    };
    
    clearOldCache();

    const loadData = () => {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      let loadedPathologies = INITIAL_PATHOLOGIES;
      let loadedGlossary = INITIAL_GLOSSARY;
      let loadedSigns = INITIAL_SIGNS;

      if (saved) {
        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
          if (parsed.pathologies && Array.isArray(parsed.pathologies)) {
             const savedIds = new Set(parsed.pathologies.map((p: any) => p.id));
             const newPathologies = INITIAL_PATHOLOGIES.filter(p => !savedIds.has(p.id));
             
             // Sanitize loaded pathologies to prevent crashes
             const validSavedPathologies = parsed.pathologies.filter((p: any) => p && p.id && p.name);
             
             loadedPathologies = [...validSavedPathologies, ...newPathologies];
             loadedGlossary = [...(parsed.glossary || []), ...INITIAL_GLOSSARY.filter(g => !parsed.glossary?.some((pg:any) => pg.id === g.id))];
             loadedSigns = [...(parsed.signs || []), ...INITIAL_SIGNS.filter(s => !parsed.signs?.some((ps:any) => ps.id === s.id))];
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Error parsing localStorage, resetting to defaults", e);
        }
      }
      
      setPathologies(loadedPathologies);
      setGlossary(loadedGlossary);
      setSigns(loadedSigns);
      setAnimations(generateDefaultAnimations(loadedPathologies));
    };

    loadData();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (pathologies.length > 0) {
      const fullData = { pathologies, glossary, signs, animations };
      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(fullData));
    }
  }, [pathologies, glossary, signs, animations]);

  const handleHardReset = () => {
    if (confirm(`¿Estás seguro? Esto borrará tus cambios personalizados y restaurará la base de datos original a la versión ${APP_VERSION}.`)) {
      localStorage.clear();
      window.location.reload();
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkScroll = () => {
      if (window.scrollY > 300) setShowScrollTop(true);
      else setShowScrollTop(false);
    };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', checkScroll);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', checkScroll);
  }, []);

  const scrollToTop = () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });

  const handleSave = (pathology: Pathology) => {
    setPathologies(prev => {
       const exists = prev.find(p => p.id === pathology.id);
       return exists ? prev.map(p => p.id === pathology.id ? pathology : p) : [...prev, pathology];
    });
    setAnimations(prev => {
       const newAnims = generateDefaultAnimations([pathology]);
       const filtered = prev.filter(a => a.id !== `anim_${pathology.id}`);
       return [...filtered, ...newAnims];
    });
    setIsModalOpen(false);
    setEditingPathology(null);
    setAutoTriggerAI(false);
    if(activeTab === 'DASHBOARD') setActiveTab('PATHOLOGIES'); // Redirect to list
  };

  const handleCreateFromDiagnosis = (partialPathology: Partial<Pathology>) => {
    const tempId = crypto.randomUUID();
    const newPathology: Pathology = {
      id: tempId,
      name: partialPathology.name || '',
      category: partialPathology.category || SystemCategory.OTROS,
      definition: partialPathology.definition || '',
      symptoms: partialPathology.symptoms || '',
      etiology: partialPathology.etiology || '',
      patterns: partialPathology.patterns || '',
      assessment: partialPathology.assessment || '',
      nanda: partialPathology.nanda || '',
      nic: partialPathology.nic || '',
      noc: partialPathology.noc || '',
      carePlan: partialPathology.carePlan || '',
      education: partialPathology.education || '',
      followUp: partialPathology.followUp || '',
      meds: partialPathology.meds || '',
      notes: partialPathology.notes || 'Generado desde Asistente Clínico'
    };
    setEditingPathology(newPathology);
    setAutoTriggerAI(true);
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };

  const handleAiExtracted = (newGlossary: GlossaryTerm[], newSigns: ClinicalSign[]) => {
    setGlossary(prev => {
      const combined = [...prev];
      newGlossary.forEach(newItem => {
        if (!combined.some(existing => existing.term.toLowerCase() === newItem.term.toLowerCase())) {
          combined.push(newItem);
        }
      });
      return combined.sort((a, b) => a.term.localeCompare(b.term));
    });
    setSigns(prev => {
      const combined = [...prev];
      newSigns.forEach(newItem => {
        if (!combined.some(existing => existing.name.toLowerCase() === newItem.name.toLowerCase())) {
          combined.push(newItem);
        }
      });
      return combined.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    });
  };

  const handleDelete = (id: string) => {
    if (confirm('¿Estás seguro de eliminar esta ficha?')) {
      setPathologies(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== id));
      setAnimations(prev => prev.filter(a => a.id !== `anim_${id}`));
      setIsModalOpen(false);
    }
  };

  const handleNandaClick = (nandaCode: string) => {
    setSearchTerm(nandaCode);
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  };

  const handleMedClick = (med: string) => {
    setSelectedDrug(med);
  };

  const renderTabs = () => {
    const currentBlock = BLOCKS.find(b => b.id === activeTab) || BLOCKS[0];
    const currentStyles = COLOR_STYLES[currentBlock.color];

    return (
      <nav className="mb-4 md:mb-6 relative z-20" aria-label="Navegación principal">
        <div className="md:hidden">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setIsBlockMenuOpen(!isBlockMenuOpen)} 
            className="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-between active:scale-[0.99] transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-600 focus:outline-none touch-manipulation min-h-[60px]"
            aria-expanded={isBlockMenuOpen}
            aria-haspopup="true"
          >
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className={`p-2.5 rounded-lg border ${currentStyles.iconBg}`}><currentBlock.icon size={20} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
               <div className="text-left"><span className="block text-xs text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-0.5">Sección Actual</span><span className="block text-base font-bold text-slate-800 leading-none">{currentBlock.label}</span></div>
             </div>
             <div className={`p-2 rounded-full bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 transition-transform duration-300 ${isBlockMenuOpen ? 'rotate-180 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700' : ''}`}>{isBlockMenuOpen ? <X size={20} aria-hidden="true" /> : <Grid size={20} aria-hidden="true" />}</div>
          </button>
          {isBlockMenuOpen && (
             <>
               <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity" onClick={() => setIsBlockMenuOpen(false)}></div>
               <div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-2 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden animate-in slide-in-from-top-5 duration-300 z-50 p-3 max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    {BLOCKS.map(block => {
                       const styles = COLOR_STYLES[block.color];
                       const isActive = activeTab === block.id;
                       return (
                         <button key={block.id} onClick={() => { setActiveTab(block.id as ActiveTab); setIsBlockMenuOpen(false); }} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 touch-manipulation text-center min-h-[120px] relative overflow-hidden focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:outline-none ${isActive ? `border-transparent shadow-md ${styles.cardActive}` : 'border-slate-100 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-sm hover:border-slate-200 focus:ring-teal-500'}`}>
                            <div className={`p-3 rounded-full mb-3 transition-transform duration-300 ${isActive ? 'bg-white shadow-sm scale-110' : 'bg-white'}`}><block.icon size={24} className={isActive ? styles.textActive : 'text-slate-500'} aria-hidden="true" /></div>
                            <span className={`text-sm font-bold leading-tight ${isActive ? styles.textActive : 'text-slate-700'}`}>{block.label}</span>
                         </button>
                       );
                    })}
                  </div>
               </div>
             </>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="hidden md:flex gap-2 border-b border-slate-200 overflow-x-auto pb-1 scrollbar-hide">
          {BLOCKS.map(block => {
             const styles = COLOR_STYLES[block.color];
             return (
               <button key={block.id} onClick={() => setActiveTab(block.id as ActiveTab)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold transition-all border-b-2 whitespace-nowrap focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 ${activeTab === block.id ? `${styles.activeTab} rounded-t-lg` : 'border-transparent text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-t-lg'}`}>
                 <block.icon size={18} aria-hidden="true" /> {block.label}
               </button>
             );
          })}
        </div>
      </nav>
    );
  };

  // --- AUTOMATIC GROUPING AND SORTING LOGIC ---
  const groupedPathologies = useMemo(() => {
    // 1. FILTERING
    const filtered = pathologies.filter(p => {
      if (!p || !p.name) return false;
      const searchLower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
      
      const name = (p.name || '').toLowerCase();
      const symptoms = (p.symptoms || '').toLowerCase();
      const nanda = (p.nanda || '').toLowerCase();

      const matchesSearch = name.includes(searchLower) || 
                            symptoms.includes(searchLower) ||
                            nanda.includes(searchLower);
                            
      const matchesCategory = selectedCategory === 'ALL' || p.category === selectedCategory;
      return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;
    });

    // 2. GROUPING BY CATEGORY
    const groups: Record<string, Pathology[]> = {};
    filtered.forEach(p => {
        const cat = p.category || 'Otros';
        if (!groups[cat]) groups[cat] = [];
        groups[cat].push(p);
    });

    // 3. SORTING KEYS (Categories Alphabetically)
    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(groups).sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));

    // 4. SORTING VALUES (Pathologies Alphabetically within Group)
    sortedKeys.forEach(key => {
        groups[key].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    });

    return { groups, sortedKeys, totalCount: filtered.length };
  }, [pathologies, searchTerm, selectedCategory]);

  return (
    <div className={`min-h-screen text-slate-800 pb-24 font-sans transition-colors duration-300 ${highContrast ? 'bg-white contrast-125' : 'bg-slate-50'}`}>
